---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Ross Cunning"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# ============================================================
# Port Everglades water-quality PDF extractor
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Strategy:
#   1. Read each PDF as text with pdftools
#   2. Normalize spacing / weird OCR-ish formatting
#   3. Split into daily sections
#   4. Parse:
#        - no-sample days
#        - sampled days
#        - record-level metadata
#        - depth-specific turbidity rows
#   5. Return one long tidy table
#
# Output:
#   - one row per depth measurement
#   - one extra "status" table for no-sample days / parsing notes
# ============================================================

library(pdftools)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)

clean_pdf_text <- function(x) {
  x |>
    str_replace_all("\u00A0", " ") |>
    str_replace_all("[\r]", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)Usft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)US ft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("(?i)Us ft", "USft") |>
    str_replace_all("[\u2013\u2014]", "-") |>
    str_replace_all("[ ]+\n", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("\n[ ]+", "\n") |>
    str_replace_all("[ \t]+", " ") |>
    str_replace_all("\n{2,}", "\n") |>
    str_trim()
}

extract_week_from_filename <- function(path) {
  fname <- basename(path)
  week_num <- str_match(fname, "[Ww]eek\\s*#?\\s*(\\d+)")[, 2]
  tibble(
    file = path,
    file_name = fname,
    week = suppressWarnings(as.integer(week_num))
  )
}

num_or_na <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x[x %in% c("NA", "", "N/A")] <- NA_character_
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

extract_page_date <- function(txt) {
  d <- str_extract(txt, "\\b\\d{1,2}/\\d{1,2}/\\d{4}\\b")
  suppressWarnings(mdy(d))
}

is_no_sample_page <- function(txt) {
  str_detect(
    txt,
    regex(
      paste(
        "No samples were collected",
        "No turbidity samples were collected",
        "No water samples were collected",
        "No work was conducted",
        "no dredging activity taking place",
        "no dredging occurred",
        sep = "|"
      ),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  ) &&
    !str_detect(txt, regex("SURFACE:|Surface:|MID:|Mid:|BOTTOM:|Bottom:", ignore_case = TRUE))
}

extract_sample_labels <- function(txt) {
  locs <- str_locate_all(
    txt,
    regex(
      sample_label_pattern(),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )[[1]]

  if (nrow(locs) == 0) return(character(0))

  map_chr(seq_len(nrow(locs)), \(i) {
    str_sub(txt, locs[i, "start"], locs[i, "end"]) |>
      str_squish()
  })
}

extract_times <- function(txt) {
  str_extract_all(txt, "\\b\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}\\s*(?:AM|PM)\\b")[[1]]
}

sample_label_pattern <- function() {
  paste0(
    "Mixing Zone\\s+(?:Background|Compliance)",
    "(?:\\s+Sample)?",
    "(?:\\s*#\\s*\\d+|\\s+\\d+(?![\\d']))?"
  )
}

extract_depth_rows <- function(txt) {
  lines <- str_split(txt, "\n")[[1]]

  depth_lines <- str_extract_all(
    lines,
    regex(
      "\\b(SURFACE|Surface|MID|Mid|BOTTOM|Bottom)\\s*:\\s*[^\\n]*",
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  ) |>
    flatten_chr() |>
    discard(~ str_trim(.x) == "")

  if (length(depth_lines) == 0) return(tibble())

  map_dfr(seq_along(depth_lines), \(i) {
    line <- str_squish(depth_lines[i])

    depth_position <- str_match(
      line,
      regex("^(SURFACE|Surface|MID|Mid|BOTTOM|Bottom)", ignore_case = TRUE)
    )[, 2] |>
      str_to_title()

    value_part <- line |>
      str_remove(regex("^(SURFACE|Surface|MID|Mid|BOTTOM|Bottom)\\s*:?", ignore_case = TRUE)) |>
      str_squish()

    vals <- str_extract_all(value_part, "-?\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?'?|NA")[[1]] |>
      str_remove("'$")

    tibble(
      row_id = i,
      depth_position = depth_position,
      sample_depth_ft = num_or_na(vals[1]),
      turbidity_ntu = num_or_na(vals[2]),
      difference_from_background = num_or_na(vals[3]),
      observed_depth_row = !is.na(num_or_na(vals[2]))
    )
  })
}

extract_depth_bundles <- function(txt) {
  rows <- extract_depth_rows(txt)

  if (nrow(rows) == 0) return(tibble())

  rows |>
    mutate(
      raw_bundle_id = ceiling(row_id / 3),
      depth_order = rep(c("Surface", "Mid", "Bottom"), length.out = n())
    ) |>
    select(
      raw_bundle_id,
      depth_position,
      sample_depth_ft,
      turbidity_ntu,
      difference_from_background,
      observed_depth_row
    )
}

empty_real_sample_slots <- function() {
  tibble(
    raw_bundle_id = integer(),
    bundle_id = integer()
  )
}

empty_sample_slots <- function() {
  tibble(
    bundle_id = integer(),
    sample_number = integer(),
    sample_group = character(),
    time = character(),
    sample_label = character()
  )
}

extract_sample_slots <- function(txt) {
  locs <- str_locate_all(
    txt,
    regex(
      sample_label_pattern(),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )[[1]]

  if (nrow(locs) == 0) return(empty_sample_slots())

  times <- extract_times(txt) |> unique()

  label_slots <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(locs)), \(i) {
    label <- str_sub(txt, locs[i, "start"], locs[i, "end"]) |> str_squish()
    sample_number <- str_match(label, "(?:#\\s*)?(\\d+)\\s*$")[, 2]
    line_prefix <- str_sub(txt, 1, locs[i, "start"] - 1) |>
      str_split("\n") |>
      pluck(1) |>
      tail(1)
    line_time <- str_extract_all(line_prefix, "\\b\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}\\s*(?:AM|PM)\\b") |>
      pluck(1) |>
      tail(1)

    if (length(line_time) == 0) line_time <- NA_character_

    tibble(
      bundle_id = i,
      sample_label = label,
      sample_group = case_when(
        str_detect(label, regex("Background", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "background",
        str_detect(label, regex("Compliance", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "compliance",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      sample_number = suppressWarnings(as.integer(sample_number)),
      line_time = line_time,
      has_sample_number = !is.na(sample_number)
    )
  }) |>
    filter(!is.na(sample_group))

  if (nrow(label_slots) == 0) return(empty_sample_slots())

  has_any_sample_number <- any(label_slots$has_sample_number)

  label_slots <- label_slots |>
    mutate(slot_event_id = ceiling(row_number() / 2))

  if (!has_any_sample_number) {
    label_slots <- label_slots |>
      mutate(sample_number = slot_event_id)
  }

  time_lookup <- tibble(
    slot_event_id = sort(unique(label_slots$slot_event_id)),
    time = times[seq_along(sort(unique(label_slots$slot_event_id)))]
  )

  label_slots |>
    left_join(time_lookup, by = "slot_event_id") |>
    mutate(
      time = coalesce(line_time, time),
      sample_label = if_else(
        is.na(sample_number),
        str_c("Mixing Zone ", str_to_title(sample_group)),
        str_c(
          "Mixing Zone ",
          str_to_title(sample_group),
          " #",
          sample_number
        )
      )
    ) |>
    select(bundle_id, sample_number, sample_group, time, sample_label)
}

extract_real_sample_slots <- function(txt) {
  slots <- extract_sample_slots(txt)

  if (nrow(slots) == 0) return(empty_real_sample_slots())

  if (any(!is.na(slots$sample_number))) {
    slots <- slots |>
      filter(!is.na(sample_number))
  }

  slots |>
    mutate(raw_bundle_id = row_number()) |>
    select(raw_bundle_id, bundle_id)
}

`%+%` <- function(a, b) paste0(a, b)

is_data_table_page <- function(txt) {
  txt <- clean_pdf_text(txt)

  str_detect(
    txt,
    regex(
      paste(
        "\\bDATE\\b\\s+(?:\\bDATA\\s+POINT\\b|\\bTYPE\\s+OF\\s+SAMPLE\\b)\\s+\\bTIME\\b",
        "\\bDATE\\b\\s+\\bTIME\\b\\s+(?:\\bDATA\\s+POINT\\b|\\bTYPE\\s+OF\\s+SAMPLE\\b)",
        sep = "|"
      ),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
  )
}

parse_page <- function(txt, file_meta, page_num) {
  txt <- clean_pdf_text(txt)
  page_date <- extract_page_date(txt)

  if (!is_data_table_page(txt)) {
    return(tibble(
      file = file_meta$file,
      file_name = file_meta$file_name,
      week = file_meta$week,
      page = page_num,
      date = page_date,
      sample_label = NA_character_,
      sample_group = NA_character_,
      sample_number = NA_integer_,
      time = NA_character_,
      bundle_id = NA_integer_,
      depth_position = NA_character_,
      sample_depth_ft = NA_real_,
      turbidity_ntu = NA_real_,
      difference_from_background = NA_real_,
      observed_depth_row = NA,
      page_status = "not_data_table"
    ))
  }

  bundles <- extract_depth_bundles(txt)
  slot_header <- extract_sample_slots(txt)

  if (nrow(slot_header) == 0) {
    slot_header <- tibble(
      bundle_id = 1:6,
      sample_number = rep(1:3, each = 2),
      sample_group = rep(c("background", "compliance"), times = 3),
      time = rep(c("8:00 AM", "12:00 PM", "4:00 PM"), each = 2),
      sample_label = str_c(
        "Mixing Zone ",
        str_to_title(sample_group),
        " #",
        sample_number
      )
    )
  }

  expected_depths <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    bundle_id = slot_header$bundle_id,
    depth_position = c("Surface", "Mid", "Bottom")
  )

  if (nrow(bundles) == 0) {
    return(
      expected_depths |>
        left_join(slot_header, by = "bundle_id") |>
        mutate(
          sample_depth_ft = NA_real_,
          turbidity_ntu = NA_real_,
          difference_from_background = NA_real_,
          observed_depth_row = FALSE,
          file = file_meta$file,
          file_name = file_meta$file_name,
          week = file_meta$week,
          page = page_num,
          date = page_date,
          page_status = "sampled_no_measurements",
          .before = 1
        )
    )
  }

  page_status <- if (any(bundles$observed_depth_row, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    "sampled"
  } else {
    "sampled_no_measurements"
  }

  real_slots <- extract_real_sample_slots(txt)

  if (nrow(real_slots) == 0) {
    real_slots <- slot_header |>
      select(bundle_id) |>
      mutate(raw_bundle_id = row_number(), .before = 1)
  }

  observed_bundles <- bundles |>
    left_join(real_slots, by = "raw_bundle_id") |>
    left_join(
      slot_header |> select(bundle_id, sample_group, sample_number),
      by = "bundle_id"
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(bundle_id)) |>
    distinct(bundle_id, depth_position, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    select(
      bundle_id,
      depth_position,
      sample_depth_ft,
      turbidity_ntu,
      difference_from_background,
      observed_depth_row
    )

  expected_depths |>
    left_join(observed_bundles, by = c("bundle_id", "depth_position")) |>
    mutate(observed_depth_row = coalesce(observed_depth_row, FALSE)) |>
    left_join(slot_header, by = "bundle_id") |>
    mutate(
      file = file_meta$file,
      file_name = file_meta$file_name,
      week = file_meta$week,
      page = page_num,
      date = page_date,
      page_status = page_status,
      .before = 1
    )
}

parse_one_pdf_pages <- function(path) {
  file_meta <- extract_week_from_filename(path)
  pages <- pdf_text(path)

  map2_dfr(
    pages,
    seq_along(pages),
    \(txt, pg) parse_page(txt, file_meta, pg)
  )
}

parse_pdf_folder <- function(pdf_dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$") {
  files <- list.files(
    pdf_dir,
    pattern = pattern,
    full.names = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

  map_dfr(files, parse_one_pdf_pages)
}

clean_output <- function(dat) {
  dat |>
    mutate(
      time_hm = suppressWarnings(parse_date_time(time, orders = c("I:M p"))),
      parse_flag = case_when(
        page_status == "not_data_table" ~ "not_data_table",
        page_status == "sampled_no_measurements" ~ "sampled_no_measurements",
        page_status == "sampled" & !observed_depth_row ~ "empty_sample_slot",
        page_status == "sampled" & observed_depth_row ~ "ok",
        TRUE ~ "check"
      )
    )
}

pdf_dir <- "/Users/rcunning/Projects/SandBypass/Sand Bypass - Turbidity Reports from Oculus"

raw_dat <- parse_pdf_folder(pdf_dir)
dat <- clean_output(raw_dat)
```

```{r}

measurements <- dat %>%
  filter(page_status != "not_data_table")

ggplot(measurements, aes(x = date, y = turbidity_ntu)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = sample_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_position)

ggplot(measurements, aes(x = sample_depth_ft)) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_position) +
  geom_histogram()




diffs <- measurements %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_number)) %>%
  select(date, sample_group, sample_number, depth_position, turbidity_ntu) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample_group, values_from = turbidity_ntu) %>%
  mutate(diff = `compliance` - `background`)



  

ggplot(diffs, aes(x = date, y = diff)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor(sample_number))) +
  facet_wrap(~depth_position) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.05)


ggplot(filter(diffs, depth_position != "Bottom"), aes(x = date, y = diff)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = factor(sample_number))) +
  #geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.019) +
  geom_line()


```
